THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEP MTM 1, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKER, RODNEY $9,195.00 PRINCIPAL, $210.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,405.00, CREDIT CARD FRAUD & UNLAWFUL TAKING OF MERCHANDISE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
